meaning: n.(锅炉,下水道供人出入检修用的)人孔,检修孔
examples: This driver cannot driver any farther because there is a man in the manhole.
Resin composite manhole cover is made of polymer composite materials, no recovery value.
Through a wide quadrivalve manhole 1-2 armoured troop carriers, a fighting vehicle or two lorries may enter the plane.
Litter bins, manhole covers, copper cables and memorial plaques have been targeted, as well as sculptures.
Transport and Technical Services will replace damaged manhole covers and resurface parts of the roads.
